MVP-62 department-gated runtime army

20,000-Agent Department-Gated Runtime Army

Scale supervised runtime capacity toward 20,000 agents only through approved department gates, staged unlocks, and circuit breakers. 20,000 is a cap, not an automatic activation. Department-gated activation is required. Staged unlocks are required. Raw fleet activation is blocked. Full 47,979 activation remains blocked.

Total registered agents: 47,979 Total departments: 1,777 MVP-62 global runtime cap: 20,000 Max cohort activation size: 1,000 Max operation chunk size: 500 Full 47,979 activation: blocked Raw 20,000-agent activation: blocked

Kill switch

Visible and ready

No department can run commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, or arbitrary actions from this page.

Kill switch visible Department approval is not command execution. Activation means supervised runtime capacity only. Staged unlocks are required. Circuit breakers pause further activation.

Loading backend state...

Global runtime army status

Cap and safety panel

Department-gated activation is required. Staged unlocks are required. Circuit breakers pause further activation. The live runtime state only expands through approved department gates.

Current live runtime agents0Combined live capacity across gates and cohorts

Max cohort activation size1,000Maximum supervised cohort request
Max operation chunk size500Chunked activation and deactivation boundary

Active department gates0Currently carrying supervised runtime capacity
Active cohorts0Currently enabled army cohorts

Stage unlock panel

Unlock staged capacity

Unlock the next stage only after the prior stage, the audit trail, the heartbeat rollup, the readiness rollup, and the circuit breaker are all in the correct state.

Stage Cap Status Safety Unlocked by Action
Loading stages...

Approved department gate selector

Search and select approved department gates

Only approved or active department gates can be selected for cohort activation. Raw fleet activation stays blocked.

Active cohorts

Current supervised runtime cohorts

Active cohorts are always tied to an approved department gate and remain capped, audited, and kill-switchable.

Cohort Department Requested / active Status Reason Action
Loading active cohorts...

Circuit breaker panel

Pause or clear staged activation

Circuit breakers pause further activation. Clearing a breaker does not activate anything automatically.

Breaker Status Reason Affected stage Affected department Action

Every activation, deactivation, heartbeat, readiness note, stage unlock, and circuit breaker update is written as an event.
